title: barleria oxyphylla
intro: Barleria oxyphylla, also known as the "Himalayan buttonbush", is a perennial plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Barleria oxyphylla can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and other health ailments.
